# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class ProductController extends Controller
{
    public function search(Request $request)
    {
        $name = trim((string) $request->input('name', ''));
        $category = $request->input('category', null);
        $minPrice = $request->input('min_price', null);
        $maxPrice = $request->input('max_price', null);
        $sort = (string) $request->input('sort', 'relevance');
        $dir = strtolower((string) $request->input('dir', 'desc')) === 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc';
        $limit = (int) $request->input('limit', 24);
        $limit = max(1, min(100, $limit));
        $page = max(1, (int) $request->input('page', 1));
        $offset = ($page - 1) * $limit;

        $bindings = [];

        $where = "p.is_active = 1";

        if ($name !== '') {
            $tokens = preg_split('/\s+/', mb_strtolower($name), -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY) ?: [];
            foreach ($tokens as $t) {
                $where .= " AND (LOWER(p.name) LIKE ? OR LOWER(p.sku) LIKE ?)";
                $like = '%' . $t . '%';
                $bindings[] = $like;
                $bindings[] = $like;
            }
        }

        if ($category !== null && $category !== '') {
            if (is_numeric($category)) {
                $where .= " AND p.category_id = ?";
                $bindings[] = (int) $category;
            } else {
                $where .= " AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM categories c WHERE c.id = p.category_id AND c.slug = ?)";
                $bindings[] = (string) $category;
            }
        }

        if ($minPrice !== null && $minPrice !== '') {
            $where .= " AND p.price >= ?";
            $bindings[] = (float) $minPrice;
        }

        if ($maxPrice !== null && $maxPrice !== '') {
            $where .= " AND p.price <= ?";
            $bindings[] = (float) $maxPrice;
        }

        $scoreExpr = "0";
        if ($name !== '') {
            $scoreExpr = "(
                CASE WHEN LOWER(p.name) = ? THEN 200 ELSE 0 END
              + CASE WHEN LOWER(p.sku) = ? THEN 180 ELSE 0 END
              + CASE WHEN LOWER(p.name) LIKE ? THEN 80 ELSE 0 END
              + CASE WHEN LOWER(p.name) LIKE ? THEN 40 ELSE 0 END
              + CASE WHEN LOWER(p.sku) LIKE ? THEN 30 ELSE 0 END
              + CASE WHEN LOWER(p.name) LIKE ? THEN 20 ELSE 0 END
            )";

            $nl = mb_strtolower($name);
            $bindingsScore = [
                $nl,
                $nl,
                $nl . '%',
                '%' . $nl . '%',
                '%' . $nl . '%',
                '%' . str_replace(' ', '%', $nl) . '%',
            ];
        } else {
            $bindingsScore = [];
        }

        $orderBy = "p.created_at DESC";
        if ($sort === 'price') {
            $orderBy = "p.price {$dir}, p.id DESC";
        } elseif ($sort === 'name') {
            $orderBy = "p.name {$dir}, p.id DESC";
        } elseif ($sort === 'newest') {
            $orderBy = "p.created_at {$dir}, p.id DESC";
        } elseif ($sort === 'relevance') {
            $orderBy = ($name !== '') ? "relevance_score DESC, p.id DESC" : "p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC";
        }

        $baseFrom = "FROM products p";
        $joinCategory = "LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id";

        $selectSql = "
            SELECT
                p.id,
                p.name,
                p.slug,
                p.sku,
                p.category_id,
                c.name AS category_name,
                c.slug AS category_slug,
                p.price,
                p.currency,
                p.is_active,
                p.created_at,
                " . ($name !== '' ? $scoreExpr : "0") . " AS relevance_score
            {$baseFrom}
            {$joinCategory}
            WHERE {$where}
            ORDER BY {$orderBy}
            LIMIT {$limit} OFFSET {$offset}
        ";

        $countSql = "
            SELECT COUNT(1) AS aggregate
            {$baseFrom}
            WHERE {$where}
        ";

        $selectBindings = array_merge($bindingsScore, $bindings);
        $countBindings = $bindings;

        $items = DB::select(DB::raw($selectSql), $selectBindings);
        $totalRow = DB::selectOne(DB::raw($countSql), $countBindings);
        $total = $totalRow ? (int) ($totalRow->aggregate ?? 0) : 0;

        return response()->json([
            'data' => $items,
            'meta' => [
                'page' => $page,
                'limit' => $limit,
                'total' => $total,
                'pages' => (int) ceil($total / max(1, $limit)),
                'sort' => $sort,
                'dir' => $dir,
                'filters' => [
                    'name' => $name !== '' ? $name : null,
                    'category' => $category !== '' ? $category : null,
                    'min_price' => $minPrice !== '' ? $minPrice : null,
                    'max_price' => $maxPrice !== '' ? $maxPrice : null,
                ],
            ],
        ]);
    }
}
